extraction.description: This screenshot shows UiPath Action Center on the Inbox page with a pending human-in-the-loop task opened for an escalated agent request. The task is titled "Categorization request #7853024" and displays incident details on the left and categorization fields on the right. The agent output explains that the incident could not be confidently categorized, and dropdowns for Category and Subcategory are available for the reviewer to complete before submitting.
extraction.step_instructions:
1. Review the incident information in the Short Description and Description fields.
2. Review the Agent Output message explaining why the case was escalated.
3. Click on the Category dropdown and select the appropriate category.
4. Click on the Subcategory dropdown and select the appropriate subcategory.
5. Click on Submit to send the human decision back to the agent.
6. If the process should not continue, click on Stop agent execution instead.
